fields.description:
At Vanta, our mission is to help businesses earn and prove trust. We believe that security should be monitored and verified continuously, and we empower companies to practice better security and prove it with ease. Vanta has a kind and talented team, and while some have prior security experience, many have been successful at Vanta without it. 

As the Senior Manager, People Systems at Vanta, you will own the strategy, execution, and continuous evolution of our HR technology ecosystem, serving as a critical technical force multiplier at the intersection of systems architecture, process automation, and agentic AI. This role starts as an individual contributor with a clear path to people leadership as the function scales.

The People Operations team ensures every Vanta employee has a seamless, well-supported experience throughout their journey with us. As we scale, our systems must evolve from operational tools to strategic enablers, driving efficiency, enabling better decision-making, and unlocking new ways of working through automation and AI while keeping humans in the loop for our core processes.

In this role, you'll partner closely with the Head of People Operations & Strategy to build a modern, integrated tech stack that reduces friction, increases data integrity, and positions Vanta's People function as a model of operational excellence. Your work will directly impact how efficiently we hire, onboard, develop, and support hundreds of employees while building the foundation for our next phase of growth.

What you’ll do as a Senior Manager, People Systems at Vanta:

 - Own the configuration, optimization, and governance of Vanta's People tech stack (currently including but not limited to HiBob, Ashby, Culture Amp, Lattice, Jira, Docebo, and Tangelo)

 - Design and maintain a coherent systems architecture across the People function, ensuring clean data flows, reliable integrations, and minimal technical debt

 - Lead the evaluation, selection, and implementation of a modern HRIS solution, establishing a scalable, People Ops-owned system and processes

 - Identify and execute automation opportunities across high-volume People processes using iPaaS tools (e.g., Workato, Boomi), reducing manual work and improving data accuracy

 - Partner with the Head of People Ops & Strategy to build and execute an agentic AI adoption roadmap, identifying high-impact use cases and piloting AI-assisted workflows

 - Serve as the primary point of accountability for system security, compliance, and data privacy across all People platforms

 - Build and maintain People data infrastructure that enables accurate, reliable reporting and analytics for business decision-making

 - Lead system implementations, migrations, and integrations from scoping through post-launch support, ensuring high-quality delivery and stakeholder alignment

 - Manage vendor relationships, renewals, and performance expectations to ensure consistent, high-quality service delivery

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with partners across the business to deliver seamless workflows and consistent data across platforms

 - Build and manage a People Systems team, hiring, onboarding, and developing talent while driving accountability and high performance across the function.

How to be successful in this role:

 - 8+ years of experience in HR technology with meaningful ownership of HRIS platforms and system integrations at companies with 500+ employees

 - Deep hands-on expertise with Workday and demonstrated ability to configure, troubleshoot, and optimize systems without heavy IT dependency

 - Strong understanding of HR systems architecture, including how ATS, LMS, performance, and compensation tools connect and where integration risks live

 - Demonstrated experience designing and implementing automation using iPaaS tools such as Workato, Boomi, or Zapier

 - Proven ability to evaluate, implement, and optimize case management or ticketing platforms in a People Ops context (e.g., Jira Service Management, Zendesk)

 - Data-first orientation: comfortable with data modeling, defining clean data structures, and ensuring cross-system consistency

 - Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and change management skills. You can translate technical complexity into business language and vice versa

 - High bias toward action and simplicity: you build for scale without over-engineering, and you know when to automate vs. when to keep it human

 - Open to using AI to amplify their skills and strengthen their work - demonstrating curiosity, a willingness to learn, and sound judgment in applying AI responsibly to improve efficiency and impact.

What you can expect as a Vanta’n:

 - Industry-competitive salary and equity

 - Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage, with 100% of employee-only benefit premiums covered for most medical plans

 - 16 weeks fully-paid Parental Leave for all new parents

 - Health & wellness stipend

 - Remote workspace, internet, and cellphone stipend

 - Commuter benefits for team members who report to the SF and NYC office

 - Family planning benefits

 - Matching 401(k) contribution with immediate vesting

 - Flexible PTO policy, plus 80 hours of Sick Time

 - 11 company-paid holidays

 - Virtual team building activities, lunch and learns, and other company-wide events!

 - Offices in SF, NYC, London, Dublin, Tel Aviv, and Sydney

To provide greater transparency to candidates, we share base pay ranges for all US-based job postings regardless of state. We set standard base pay ranges for all roles based on function, level, and country location, benchmarked against similar-stage growth companies. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors and may vary based on candidate location, skills, depth of work experience, and relevant licenses/credentials.

#LI-remote

At Vanta, we are committed to hiring diverse talent of different backgrounds and as such, it is important to us to provide an inclusive work environment for all. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender identity, age, religion, sexual orientation, veteran or disability status, or any other protected class. As an equal opportunity employer, we encourage and welcome people of all backgrounds to apply.

About Vanta

We started in 2018, in the wake of several high-profile data breaches. Online security was only becoming more important, but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast-growing companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling companies to improve and prove their security. From our early days automating security monitoring for compliance standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the world's leading Trust Management Platform, our vision remains unchanged. 

Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a point-in-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust— all in a way that's real-time and transparent.

Referral Instructions

If you are being referred for the role, please contact that person to apply on your behalf.
fields.title: Senior Manager, People Systems
